---
title: "Edith Emily Moberly"
---

## Edith Emily Moberly

**Dates:** (5 May 1839-1902)

### Description

third daughter of the Rt. Rev. George Moberly

### Biography

[<i>Dulce Domum</i>]

### Letters

- Letter from March 28th [1884] 
- Letter from [March 1871[[footnote:2]]]
- Letter from Novr 6 th [1869]
- Letter from Novr 28th [1865?][[footnote:1]]
- Letter from June 1855.
- Letter from Sept 24th [1846[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
